programmes.show_description: These are power ladies who really rock! From Avril Lavigne and Pink to Amy Lee and Hayley Williams.
The legendary frontman of rock icons Deep Purple has handpicked 25 of the finest bands from the past six decades. It's classics all the way, so crank it up!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
An hour of the most memorable riffs in rock & pop! From Guns n Roses & Bon Jovi to ZZ Top & U2.
All 90s rock hits & power ballads! From Aerosmith, KISS & The Foo Fighters to The Stone Roses, Garbage & The Stereophonics. This is NOW Rock!
A definitive 6 hour marathon of 00s rock anthems in order! From Alien Ant Farm to The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy to The Foo Fighters, Weezer to the White Stripes.
Which is the best way to truly rock? Climbing a stairway to Heaven or cruising down that highway to Hell? You decide!
From 2003 to 2006 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Evanescence!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
The 30 greatest rock drummers in the world! These are Nicky's hardest hitters featuring Dave Grohl, Tommy Lee, Keith Moon, Ginger Baker, John Bonham but who is his Number 1?
50 tracks we know you know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first note, you'll be singing them all night long!
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
The legends and bands that made the 00s rock! Expect anthems from Nickleback, Green Day, Linkin Park, The Arctic Monkeys, Evanescence and many more.
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programmes.show_name: Turn Up The Pop Punk Anthems!
programmes.show_description: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 1 hour of 00s Pop Punk Anthems in order, featurng Green Day, Blink-182, Sum 41, Bowling For Soup & The All-American Rejects.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Bruno Brookes with the biggest UK rock tracks of the 90s. Expect a decent slice of Stereophonics, Bon Jovi, Nirvana and RHCP. But you might be surprised at the No.1!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Starting in 2001, here are the biggest rock songs from Linkin Park!
Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!
From the rebellious teens of the 90s and 00s we bring you the stars who said "To hell with the world" and expressed themselves through great tunes!
A definitive selection of rock and indie anthems from the 2010s! Starting with My Chemical Romance in 2010 right through to Liam Gallagher at the end of the decade.
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands and artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
